verses.latin_vulgate: Et introduxit me in templum, et mensus est frontes : sex cubitos latitudinis hinc, et sex cubitos latitudinis inde, latitudinem tabernaculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבִיאֵ֖נִי אֶל־הַהֵיכָ֑ל וַיָּ֣מׇד אֶת־הָאֵילִ֗ים שֵׁשׁ־אַמּ֨וֹת רֹ֧חַב מִפּ֛וֹ וְשֵׁשׁ־אַמּֽוֹת־רֹ֥חַב מִפּ֖וֹ רֹ֥חַב הָאֹֽהֶל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me into the temple, and he measured the fronts six cubits broad on this side, and six cubits on that side, the breadth of the tabernacle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vei minun templin, ja mittasi patsaat seiniä myöten, ja ne olivat joka taholla kuusi kyynärää leveät, niin leveältä kuin huone oli.
verses.king_james: Afterward he brought me to the temple, and measured the posts, six cubits broad on the one side, and six cubits broad on the other side, which was the breadth of the tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et latitudo portæ decem cubitorum erat : et latera portæ, quinque cubitis hinc, et quinque cubitis inde : et mensus est longitudinem ejus quadraginta cubitorum, et latitudinem viginti cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרֹ֣חַב הַפֶּ֘תַח֮ עֶ֣שֶׂר אַמּוֹת֒ וְכִתְפ֣וֹת הַפֶּ֔תַח חָמֵ֤שׁ אַמּוֹת֙ מִפּ֔וֹ וְחָמֵ֥שׁ אַמּ֖וֹת מִפּ֑וֹ וַיָּ֤מׇד אׇרְכּוֹ֙ אַרְבָּעִ֣ים אַמָּ֔ה וְרֹ֖חַב עֶשְׂרִ֥ים אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the breadth of the gate was ten cubits: and the sides of the gate five cubits on this side, and five cubits on that side: and he measured the length thereof forty cubits, and the breadth twenty cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ovi oli kymmenen kyynärää leveä, mutta kukin seinä molemmin puolin ovea viisi kyynärää leveä. Ja hän mittasi sian templissä, se oli neljäkymmentä kyynärää pituudelle ja kaksi kymmentä kyynärää leveydelle.
verses.king_james: And the breadth of the door was ten cubits; and the sides of the door were five cubits on the one side, and five cubits on the other side: and he measured the length thereof, forty cubits: and the breadth, twenty cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et introgressus intrinsecus, mensus est in fronte portæ duos cubitos : et portam, sex cubitorum : et latitudinem portæ septem cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָ֣א לִפְנִ֔ימָה וַיָּ֥מׇד אֵֽיל־הַפֶּ֖תַח שְׁתַּ֣יִם אַמּ֑וֹת וְהַפֶּ֙תַח֙ שֵׁ֣שׁ אַמּ֔וֹת וְרֹ֥חַב הַפֶּ֖תַח שֶׁ֥בַע אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then going inward he measured the front of the gate two cubits: and the gate six cubits, and the breadth of the gate seven cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän meni sisimäiselle puolelle, ja mittasi oven patsaat kaksi kyynärää, ja ovi oli kuusi kyynärää, ja oven leveys seitsemän kyynärää.
verses.king_james: Then went he inward, and measured the post of the door, two cubits; and the door, six cubits; and the breadth of the door, seven cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est longitudinem ejus viginti cubitorum, et latitudinem ejus viginti cubitorum, ante faciem templi. Et dixit ad me : Hoc est Sanctum sanctorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨מׇד אֶת־אׇרְכּ֜וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֣ים אַמָּ֗ה וְרֹ֛חַב עֶשְׂרִ֥ים אַמָּ֖ה אֶל־פְּנֵ֣י הַהֵיכָ֑ל וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֔י זֶ֖ה קֹ֥דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the length thereof twenty cubits, and the breadth twenty cubits, before the face of the temple: and he said to me: This is the holy of holies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi sen pituuden kaksikymmentä kyynärää ja leveyden kaksikymmentä kyynärää templissä, ja sanoi minulle: tämä on kaikkien pyhin.
verses.king_james: So he measured the length thereof, twenty cubits; and the breadth, twenty cubits, before the temple: and he said unto me, This is the most holy place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est parietem domus sex cubitorum : et latitudinem lateris quatuor cubitorum undique per circuitum domus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥מׇד קִֽיר־הַבַּ֖יִת שֵׁ֣שׁ אַמּ֑וֹת וְרֹ֣חַב הַצֵּלָע֩ אַרְבַּ֨ע אַמּ֜וֹת סָבִ֧יב ׀ סָבִ֛יב לַבַּ֖יִת סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the wall of the house six cubits: and the breadth of every side chamber four cubits round about the house on every side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi huoneen seinän kuusi kyynärää: siellä olivat sivukammiot, neljä kyynärää leveät, joka paikassa ympäri huonetta;
verses.king_james: After he measured the wall of the house, six cubits; and the breadth of every side chamber, four cubits, round about the house on every side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Latera autem, latus ad latus, bis triginta tria : et erant eminentia, quæ ingrederentur per parietem domus, in lateribus per circuitum, ut continerent, et non attingerent parietem templi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַצְּלָעוֹת֩ צֵלָ֨ע אֶל־צֵלָ֜ע שָׁל֧וֹשׁ וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים פְּעָמִ֗ים וּ֠בָא֠וֹת בַּקִּ֨יר אֲשֶׁר־לַבַּ֧יִת לַצְּלָע֛וֹת סָבִ֥יב ׀ סָבִ֖יב לִהְי֣וֹת אֲחוּזִ֑ים וְלֹֽא־יִהְי֥וּ אֲחוּזִ֖ים בְּקִ֥יר הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the side chambers one by another, were twice thirty-three: and they bore outwards, that they might enter in through the wall of the house in the sides round about, to hold in, and not to touch the wall of the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sivulla kammiot kaikilla puolilla kolmeneljättäkymmentä toinen toisessansa kiinni; ja siinä olivat patsaat huoneen seinää myöten kaikki ympäri, jotka niitä kiinnittivät; ja ei kuitenkaan olleet huoneen seinässä kiinni.
verses.king_james: And the side chambers were three, one over another, and thirty in order; and they entered into the wall which was of the house for the side chambers round about, that they might have hold, but they had not hold in the wall of the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et platea erat in rotundum, ascendens sursum per cochleam, et in cœnaculum templi deferebat per gyrum : idcirco latius erat templum in superioribus : et sic de inferioribus ascendebatur ad superiora in medium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽרָחֲבָ֡ה וְֽנָסְבָה֩ לְמַ֨עְלָה לְמַ֜עְלָה לַצְּלָע֗וֹת כִּ֣י מֽוּסַב־הַ֠בַּ֠יִת לְמַ֨עְלָה לְמַ֜עְלָה סָבִ֤יב ׀ סָבִיב֙ לַבַּ֔יִת עַל־כֵּ֥ן רֹחַב־לַבַּ֖יִת לְמָ֑עְלָה וְכֵ֧ן הַתַּחְתּוֹנָ֛ה יַעֲלֶ֥ה עַל־הָעֶלְיוֹנָ֖ה לַתִּיכוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was a broad passage round about, going up by winding stairs, and it led into the upper loft of the temple all round: therefore was the temple broader in the higher parts: and so from the lower parts they went to the higher by the midst.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ylhäällä näiden päällä olivat vielä usiammat käytävät ympärinsä, ja ne ylimmäiset käytävät ympäri huoneen olivat leveämmät, niin että alimmaisesta mentiin keskimmäiseen ja keskimmäisestä ylimmäiseen.
verses.king_james: And there was an enlarging, and a winding about still upward to the side chambers: for the winding about of the house went still upward round about the house: therefore the breadth of the house was still upward, and so increased from the lowest chamber to the highest by the midst.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidi in domo altitudinem per circuitum, fundata latera ad mensuram calami sex cubitorum spatio :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָאִ֧יתִי לַבַּ֛יִת גֹּ֖בַהּ סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב (מיסדות) [מוּסְד֤וֹת] הַצְּלָעוֹת֙ מְל֣וֹ הַקָּנֶ֔ה שֵׁ֥שׁ אַמּ֖וֹת אַצִּֽילָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I saw in the house the height round about, the foundations of the side chambers which were the measure of a reed the space of six cubits:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä näin huoneen korkeuden joka taholta, ja kammioin perustukset olevan täyttä mittaa kuusi kyynärää.
verses.king_james: I saw also the height of the house round about: the foundations of the side chambers were a full reed of six great cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: et latitudinem per parietem lateris forinsecus quinque cubitorum : et erat interior domus in lateribus domus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֹ֣חַב הַקִּ֧יר אֲֽשֶׁר־לַצֵּלָ֛ע אֶל־הַח֖וּץ חָמֵ֣שׁ אַמּ֑וֹת וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר מֻנָּ֔ח בֵּ֥ית צְלָע֖וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר לַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the thickness of the wall for the side chamber without, which was five cubits: and the inner house was within the side chambers of the house,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja seinän leveys, joka oli kammion ulkoisella puolella, oli viisi kyynärää; ne muut olivat huoneen käytävät sisimäisellä puolella.
verses.king_james: The thickness of the wall, which was for the side chamber without, was five cubits: and that which was left was the place of the side chambers that were within.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inter gazophylacia latitudinem viginti cubitorum in circuitu domus undique,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֵ֨ין הַלְּשָׁכ֜וֹת רֹ֣חַב עֶשְׂרִ֥ים אַמָּ֛ה סָבִ֥יב לַבַּ֖יִת סָבִ֥יב ׀ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And between the chambers was the breadth of twenty cubits round about the house on every side.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kammioiden välillä ympäri huoneen oli leveys kaksikymmentä kyynärää.
verses.king_james: And between the chambers was the wideness of twenty cubits round about the house on every side.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ostium lateris ad orationem : ostium unum ad viam aquilonis, et ostium unum ad viam australem : et latitudinem loci ad orationem, quinque cubitorum in circuitu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפֶ֤תַח הַצֵּלָע֙ לַמֻּנָּ֔ח פֶּ֤תַח אֶחָד֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַצָּפ֔וֹן וּפֶ֥תַח אֶחָ֖ד לַדָּר֑וֹם וְרֹ֙חַב֙ מְק֣וֹם הַמֻּנָּ֔ח חָמֵ֥שׁ אַמּ֖וֹת סָבִ֥יב ׀ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the door of the side chambers was turned towards the place of prayer: one door was toward the north, and another door was toward the south: and the breadth of the place for prayer, was five cubits round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siellä oli kaksi ovea, eripaikan kohdalla, yksi pohjoista päin ja toinen etelää, ja eripaikka viisi kyynärää joka taholta.
verses.king_james: And the doors of the side chambers were toward the place that was left, one door toward the north, and another door toward the south: and the breadth of the place that was left was five cubits round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ædificium, quod erat separatum, versumque ad viam respicientem ad mare, latitudinis septuaginta cubitorum : paries autem ædificii, quinque cubitorum latitudinis per circuitum : et longitudo ejus nonaginta cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַבִּנְיָ֡ן אֲשֶׁר֩ אֶל־פְּנֵ֨י הַגִּזְרָ֜ה פְּאַ֣ת דֶּֽרֶךְ־הַיָּ֗ם רֹ֚חַב שִׁבְעִ֣ים אַמָּ֔ה וְקִ֧יר הַבִּנְיָ֛ן חָמֵשׁ־אַמּ֥וֹת רֹ֖חַב סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב וְאׇרְכּ֖וֹ תִּשְׁעִ֥ים אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the building that was separate, and turned to the way that looked toward the sea, was seventy cubits broad and the wall of the building, five cubits thick round about: and ninety cubits long.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rakennus länteen päin oli seitsemänkymmentä kyynärää leveä, ja seinä viisi kyynärää leveä ja yhdeksänkymmentä kyynärää pitkä.
verses.king_james: Now the building that was before the separate place at the end toward the west was seventy cubits broad; and the wall of the building was five cubits thick round about, and the length thereof ninety cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est domus longitudinem, centum cubitorum : et quod separatum erat ædificium, et parietes ejus, longitudinis centum cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָדַ֣ד אֶת־הַבַּ֔יִת אֹ֖רֶךְ מֵאָ֣ה אַמָּ֑ה וְהַגִּזְרָ֤ה וְהַבִּנְיָה֙ וְקִ֣ירוֹתֶ֔יהָ אֹ֖רֶךְ מֵאָ֥ה אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the length of the house, a hundred cubits: and the separate building, and the walls thereof, a hundred cubits in length.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi huoneen pituuden sata kyynärää, nimittäin, eripaikan, rakennuksen ja sen seinän pituus oli kaikkiansa sata kyynärää.
verses.king_james: So he measured the house, an hundred cubits long; and the separate place, and the building, with the walls thereof, an hundred cubits long;

verses.latin_vulgate: Latitudo autem ante faciem domus, et ejus quod erat separatum contra orientem, centum cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרֹ֩חַב֩ פְּנֵ֨י הַבַּ֧יִת וְהַגִּזְרָ֛ה לַקָּדִ֖ים מֵאָ֥ה אַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the breadth before the face of the house, and of the separate place toward the east, a hundred cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja huoneen leveys edestä, sen eripaikan kanssa itään päin, oli myös sata kyynärää.
verses.king_james: Also the breadth of the face of the house, and of the separate place toward the east, an hundred cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mensus est longitudinem ædificii contra faciem ejus, quod erat separatum ad dorsum : ethecas ex utraque parte centum cubitorum : et templum interius, et vestibula atrii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָדַ֣ד אֹֽרֶךְ־הַ֠בִּנְיָ֠ן אֶל־פְּנֵ֨י הַגִּזְרָ֜ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר עַל־אַחֲרֶ֧יהָ (ואתוקיהא) [וְאַתִּיקֶ֛יהָא] מִפּ֥וֹ וּמִפּ֖וֹ מֵאָ֣ה אַמָּ֑ה וְהַהֵיכָל֙ הַפְּנִימִ֔י וְאֻלַמֵּ֖י הֶחָצֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he measured the length of the building over against it, which was separated at the back of it: and the galleries on both sides a hundred cubits: and the inner temple, and the porches of the court.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän mittasi rakennuksen pituuden, eripaikan edestä, yhdestä päästä niin toiseen, joka haaralta sata kyynärää, sisällisen templin ja esihuoneen kartanon kanssa.
verses.king_james: And he measured the length of the building over against the separate place which was behind it, and the galleries thereof on the one side and on the other side, an hundred cubits, with the inner temple, and the porches of the court;

verses.latin_vulgate: Limina, et fenestras obliquas, et ethecas in circuitu per tres partes, contra uniuscujusque limen, stratumque ligno per gyrum in circuitu : terra autem usque ad fenestras, et fenestræ clausæ super ostia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַסִּפִּ֡ים וְהַחַלּוֹנִ֣ים הָ֠אֲטֻמ֠וֹת וְהָאַתִּיקִ֤ים ׀ סָבִיב֙ לִשְׁלׇשְׁתָּ֔ם נֶ֧גֶד הַסַּ֛ף שְׂחִ֥יף עֵ֖ץ סָבִ֣יב ׀ סָבִ֑יב וְהָאָ֙רֶץ֙ עַד־הַֽחַלּוֹנ֔וֹת וְהַחַלֹּנ֖וֹת מְכֻסּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The thresholds, and the oblique windows, and the galleries round about on three sides, over against the threshold of every one, and floored with wood all round about: and the ground was up to the windows, and the windows were shut over the doors.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siinä olivat kynnykset ja ne ahtaat akkunat ja käytävät ympäri, niiden kolmen * edessä, olivat kaunistetut puuteolla yltympäri, aina maasta akkunoihin asti; itse akkunat myös olivat kaunistetut.
verses.king_james: The door posts, and the narrow windows, and the galleries round about on their three stories, over against the door, cieled with wood round about, and from the ground up to the windows, and the windows were covered;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et usque ad domum interiorem, et forinsecus per omnem parietem in circuitu, intrinsecus et forinsecus, ad mensuram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־מֵעַ֣ל הַפֶּ֡תַח וְעַד־הַבַּ֩יִת֩ הַפְּנִימִ֨י וְלַח֜וּץ וְאֶל־כׇּל־הַקִּ֨יר סָבִ֧יב ׀ סָבִ֛יב בַּפְּנִימִ֥י וּבַחִיצ֖וֹן מִדּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And even to the inner house, and without all the wall round about within and without, by measure.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte oven päältä, niin aina kaikkein pyhimpään, ulkonaiselta ja sisimäiseltä puolelta yltympäri, aina mitalla.
verses.king_james: To that above the door, even unto the inner house, and without, and by all the wall round about within and without, by measure.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fabrefacta cherubim et palmæ : et palma inter cherub et cherub, duasque facies habebat cherub.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָשׂ֥וּי כְּרוּבִ֖ים וְתִמֹרִ֑ים וְתִֽמֹרָה֙ בֵּין־כְּר֣וּב לִכְר֔וּב וּשְׁנַ֥יִם פָּנִ֖ים לַכְּרֽוּב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were cherubims and palm trees wrought, so that a palm tree was between a cherub and a cherub, and every cherub had two faces.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se oli tehty Kerubimeilla ja palmupuilla, niin että yksi palmupuu oli kunkin Kerubimin välillä, ja Kerubimilla oli kahdet kasvot:
verses.king_james: And it was made with cherubims and palm trees, so that a palm tree was between a cherub and a cherub; and every cherub had two faces;

verses.latin_vulgate: Faciem hominis juxta palmam ex hac parte, et faciem leonis juxta palmam ex alia parte : expressam per omnem domum in circuitu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפְנֵ֨י אָדָ֤ם אֶל־הַתִּֽמֹרָה֙ מִפּ֔וֹ וּפְנֵי־כְפִ֥יר אֶל־הַתִּמֹרָ֖ה מִפּ֑וֹ עָשׂ֥וּי אֶל־כׇּל־הַבַּ֖יִת סָבִ֥יב ׀ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The face of a man was toward the palm tree on one side, and the face of a lion was toward the palm tree on the other side: set forth through all the house round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhdellä puolella niinkuin ihmisen kasvot palmupuun kohdalla, ja toisella niinkuin nuoren jalopeuran kasvot palmupuun kohdalla: se oli niin tehty kaiken huoneen ympärille.
verses.king_james: So that the face of a man was toward the palm tree on the one side, and the face of a young lion toward the palm tree on the other side: it was made through all the house round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: De terra usque ad superiora portæ, cherubim et palmæ cælatæ erant in pariete templi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵהָאָ֙רֶץ֙ עַד־מֵעַ֣ל הַפֶּ֔תַח הַכְּרוּבִ֥ים וְהַתִּמֹרִ֖ים עֲשׂוּיִ֑ם וְקִ֖יר הַׄהֵׄיׄכָֽׄלׄ׃
verses.douay_rheims: From the ground even to the upper parts of the gate, were cherubims and palm trees wrought in the wall of the temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Maasta ylimmäisen oven päälliseen asti olivat Kerubimit ja palmupuut tehdyt, niin myös templin seiniin.
verses.king_james: From the ground unto above the door were cherubims and palm trees made, and on the wall of the temple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Limen quadrangulum, et facies sanctuarii, aspectus contra aspectum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַהֵיכָ֖ל מְזוּזַ֣ת רְבֻעָ֑ה וּפְנֵ֣י הַקֹּ֔דֶשׁ הַמַּרְאֶ֖ה כַּמַּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The threshold was foursquare, and the face of the sanctuary sight to sight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja templin ovipielet olivat nelikulmaiset, ja kaikki pyhässä taitavasti toinen toiseensa sovitetut.
verses.king_james: The posts of the temple were squared, and the face of the sanctuary; the appearance of the one as the appearance of the other.

verses.latin_vulgate: Altaris lignei trium cubitorum altitudo, et longitudo ejus duorum cubitorum : et anguli ejus, et longitudo ejus, et parietes ejus lignei. Et locutus est ad me : Hæc est mensa coram Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמִּזְבֵּ֡חַ עֵ֣ץ שָׁלוֹשׁ֩ אַמּ֨וֹת גָּבֹ֜הַּ וְאׇרְכּ֣וֹ שְׁתַּֽיִם־אַמּ֗וֹת וּמִקְצֹֽעוֹתָיו֙ ל֔וֹ וְאׇרְכּ֥וֹ וְקִירֹתָ֖יו עֵ֑ץ וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר אֵלַ֔י זֶ֚ה הַשֻּׁלְחָ֔ן אֲשֶׁ֖ר לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The altar of wood was three cubits high: and the length thereof was two cubits: and the corners thereof, aid the length thereof, and the walls thereof, were of wood. And he said to me: This is the table before the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puualttari kolme kyynärää korkia ja kaksi kyynärää pitkä, ja sen kulmat, leveys ja seinät olivat puusta. Ja hän sanoi minulle: tämän on pöytä, joka pitää Herran edessä oleman.
verses.king_james: The altar of wood was three cubits high, and the length thereof two cubits; and the corners thereof, and the length thereof, and the walls thereof, were of wood: and he said unto me, This is the table that is before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et duo ostia erant in templo et in sanctuario.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁתַּ֧יִם דְּלָת֛וֹת לַהֵיכָ֖ל וְלַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were two doors in the temple, and in the sanctuary.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja oli myös kaksi ovea sekä templiin että kaikkein pyhimpään.
verses.king_james: And the temple and the sanctuary had two doors.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in duobus ostiis ex utraque parte bina erant ostiola quæ in se invicem plicabantur : bina enim ostia erant ex utraque parte ostiorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁתַּ֥יִם דְּלָת֖וֹת לַדְּלָת֑וֹת שְׁ֚תַּיִם מוּסַבּ֣וֹת דְּלָת֔וֹת שְׁ֚תַּיִם לְדֶ֣לֶת אֶחָ֔ת וּשְׁתֵּ֥י דְלָת֖וֹת לָאַחֶֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the two doors on both sides were two little doors, which were folded within each other: for there were two wickets on both sides of the doors.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja taas olivat kaksinkertaiset ovet, kaksi vähää ovea yhdessä ja kaksi toisessa.
verses.king_james: And the doors had two leaves apiece, two turning leaves; two leaves for the one door, and two leaves for the other door.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cælata erant in ipsis ostiis templi cherubim, et sculpturæ palmarum, sicut in parietibus quoque expressæ erant : quam ob rem et grossiora erant ligna in vestibuli fronte forinsecus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲשׂוּיָ֨ה אֲלֵיהֶ֜ן אֶל־דַּלְת֤וֹת הַהֵיכָל֙ כְּרוּבִ֣ים וְתִמֹרִ֔ים כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר עֲשׂוּיִ֖ם לַקִּיר֑וֹת וְעָ֥ב עֵ֛ץ אֶל־פְּנֵ֥י הָאוּלָ֖ם מֵהַחֽוּץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there were cherubims also wrought in the doors of the temple, and the figures of palm trees, like as were made on the walls: for which cause also the planks were thicker in the front of the porch without.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja templin oviin olivat tehdyt Kerubimit ja palmupuut, niinkuin seinissäkin; ja siinä oli paksu puu esihuoneen edessä ulkoisella puolella.
verses.king_james: And there were made on them, on the doors of the temple, cherubims and palm trees, like as were made upon the walls; and there were thick planks upon the face of the porch without.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super quæ fenestræ obliquæ, et similitudo palmarum hinc atque inde in humerulis vestibuli, secundum latera domus, latitudinemque parietum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחַלּוֹנִ֨ים אֲטֻמ֤וֹת וְתִֽמֹרִים֙ מִפּ֣וֹ וּמִפּ֔וֹ אֶל־כִּתְפ֖וֹת הָאוּלָ֑ם וְצַלְע֥וֹת הַבַּ֖יִת וְהָעֻבִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Upon which were the oblique windows, and the representation of palm trees on this side, and on that side in the sides of the porch, according to the sides of the house, and the breadth of the walls.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olivat ahtaat akkunat ja paljo palmupuita, kaikki ympäri esihuoneen; niin myös huoneen kammiot ja malat.
verses.king_james: And there were narrow windows and palm trees on the one side and on the other side, on the sides of the porch, and upon the side chambers of the house, and thick planks.
